items.importDataSub: Migrate your series and movies history
items.notifPrefsSub: Choose what you want to receive

vip.bannerSub: Themed profile, custom Home and reminders
vip.renewalSub: PRO features enabled in this version
vip.tagline: Your movies and series experience, your way
vip.welcomeDesc: You can now customize your profile and Home and create lists with reminders.
vip.paymentNote: Billing will be connected before publication

features.profileThemeDesc: Show-inspired theme or your own cover
features.customHomeDesc: Only show the sections you prefer
features.reminderListsDesc: Pick a date and get reminded

proSettings.title: PRO settings
proSettings.memberSub: Your profile, Home and reminders, your way.
proSettings.previewSub: Explore and configure the features before activating the demo.
proSettings.coverError: The cover could not be processed.
proSettings.saveError: Your changes remain on this device, but they could not be synced right now.

profile.title: Profile theme and cover
profile.detail: Choose a theme inspired by a show on your list or upload an exclusive cover.
profile.storagePending: Cover uploads will be enabled in the future.

badges.title: Monthly badges
badges.detail: Badges will highlight your monthly participation on your profile.
badges.comingSoon: New rules and collections are coming soon.

home.title: Customize Home
home.detail: This selection only applies to your PRO account and never changes other members' Home.
home.keepOne: Keep at least one section visible on Home.

reminders.title: Lists with reminders
reminders.detail: Create a list with your own name and choose when the app should remind you.
reminders.listPlaceholder: List name, e.g. Watch on vacation
reminders.notificationsToggle: Turn notifications for {{name}} on or off
reminders.required: Enter the list name, title and date.

language.title: Language & region
language.note: Language has been updated across the interface.

logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.body: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.storagePending: Photo uploads will be enabled in the future.
editProfile.usernameInvalid: Invalid username. Use only letters, numbers and _

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.errorTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
changePassword.tip: 💡 Use at least 8 characters, including uppercase letters, numbers and symbols for a strong password.

expenses.title: Streaming Expenses
expenses.emptyDetail: Add your streaming services to calculate your expenses
expenses.editDetail: Change the plan and monthly price

import.title: Import from TV Time
import.description: Import your watched series from TV Time to Maratonou.
import.error: Error importing file. Please check the format.

notifPrefs.title: Notification preferences
notifPrefs.intro: Turn the notification types you want on or off. Changes apply across all your devices.
notifPrefs.pushDisabled: Enable to receive alerts while the app is closed
notifPrefs.pushBlocked: Blocked in the browser or system settings
notifPrefs.mentionsSub: When someone mentions you in a comment
notifPrefs.repliesSub: When someone replies to your comments
notifPrefs.premieresSub: When a title arrives on a platform you use
notifPrefs.episodesSub: When shows you follow release an episode
notifPrefs.remindersSub: Alerts for dates in your custom lists
